criteria.evidence: Names `AcmePaymentTransaction::prepareRow()` as the method to change and discusses normalization inside `prepareRow()`.
Correctly describes Stripe path: serialized PHP object in `payload`, `unserialize(... allowed_classes => FALSE)`, extracts `paymentRef` and `payMethod`.
Correctly describes Paypal path: plain-text `message`, parsed by delimiters into key/value pairs, normalized into serialized `payload`.
Explicitly names `DrupalDateTime::getTimestamp()` and conversion of `acceptance_date` / `paypal_clearing_date` to Unix timestamps with NULL on parse failure.
